query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dialog_tags` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `dialogId` int NOT NULL,
  `tagId` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `dialog_tags_dialogId_idx` (`dialogId`),
  KEY `dialog_tags_tagId_idx` (`tagId`),
  CONSTRAINT `dialog_tags_dialogId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`dialogId`) REFERENCES `dialogs` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `dialog_tags_tagId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`tagId`) REFERENCES `tags` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
command:

  `dialogId` int NOT NULL,

  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),

  KEY `dialog_tags_tagId_idx` (`tagId`),
  CONSTRAINT `dialog_tags_dialogId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`dialogId`) REFERENCES `dialogs` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `dialog_tags_tagId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`tagId`) REFERENCES `tags` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
